allow: PowerShell(Get-Content backend\\app\\services\\auth_service.py -Raw -Encoding utf8 | Select-String -Pattern "get_or_create_google_user" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Count }; Get-Content backend\\app\\schemas\\user.py -Raw -Encoding utf8 | Select-String "class GoogleLogin" | ForEach-Object { "schema ok" }; & backend\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('backend/app/services/auth_service.py', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('backend/app/schemas/user.py', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('backend/app/routers/auth.py', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('backend/app/config.py', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax ok'\)")

PowerShell(& backend\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend'\); from app.routers import auth; from app.services import auth_service; from app.schemas.user import GoogleLogin; print\('backend imports ok:', hasattr\(auth_service, 'get_or_create_google_user'\)\)")
PowerShell(cd backend; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'venv|env' } | Select-Object Name; Test-Path .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe)
PowerShell(cd frontend; $env:VITE_CJS_TRACE=""; npm run dev 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\vite_dev.log" -Encoding utf8)

PowerShell($mods = @\("/src/main.jsx","/src/App.jsx","/src/api/skillpathV3Api.js","/src/store/skillpathStore.js","/src/pages/DomainSelect.jsx","/src/pages/RoadmapDashboard.jsx","/src/components/SkillPath/RoadmapDashboard.jsx","/src/components/SkillPath/DomainSwitcher.jsx"\); foreach \($m in $mods\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174$m" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("OK   {0}  \({1} bytes\)" -f $m, $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \("FAIL {0}  -> {1}" -f $m, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($f = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/src/api/skillpathV3Api.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("5174 imports axios.js? {0}" -f \($f.Content -match 'api/axios'\)\); Write-Output \("5174 still has /client? {0}" -f \($f.Content -match '/client'\)\))
PowerShell(python -c "from app.models.practice import TopicQuestion; print\('OK:', 'created_order' in TopicQuestion.__table__.columns\)")
PowerShell(& ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import app.main; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(r.path for r in app.main.app.routes if '/resume' in r.path\)\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5174 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
